reviews.comment:
Hoy domingo fui a cargar nafta pero no tienen sistema. Tienen nafta y no te la dan. No avanza ypf. Y Irigoyen peron frondizi 0 compromiso con los consumidores

(Translated by Google)
Today, Sunday, I went to get gas, but they don't have a system. They have gas, but they don't give it to you. YPF isn't making progress. And Irigoyen Peron Frondizi has zero commitment to consumers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1NDR6WENREAE

reviews.comment:
La tienda es excelente. Buen café y productos frescos. Lugar agradable. Se tarda un poco para cargar nafta. Si tenes la App de YPF los domingos tenes descuento 5%t/ nafta

(Translated by Google)
The store is excellent. Good coffee and fresh produce. Pleasant place. It takes a while to get gas. If you have the YPF app, you get a 5% discount on gas on Sundays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1dzZMMm5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
No podian poner a playeros mas vagos y lentos, se los ve hablando con el policia , cag@ndose de risa mientras la fila se hace infinita, una verguenza que no haya un supervisor que ponga orden y agilice la carga de combustible, la decadencia del servicio!! dejo fotos mias descansando mientras cargan ...

(Translated by Google)
They couldn't have hired lazier, slower gas station attendants. You can see them talking to the police officer, laughing their heads off while the line gets endless. It's a disgrace that there's no supervisor to keep order and speed up the refueling. The service is in such a state! I'm attaching photos of myself resting while they refuel...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1N2NQYkxnEAE

reviews.comment:
Supongo que se refiere a la estación de servicio que está en la planta baja del edificio central del Automóvil Club Argentino. Es una de las más tradicionales de Buenos Aires, bien organizada y eficiente, aunque a veces hay cola y se debe esperar bastante, con alguno que otro incidente entre automovilistas, lo que es un bajón. Hacen el descuento para gente socia del ACA. Es recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
I assume you're referring to the service station on the ground floor of the Argentine Automobile Club's main building. It's one of the most traditional in Buenos Aires, well-organized and efficient, although there are sometimes long lines and you have to wait a long time, with the occasional incident between motorists, which is a downer. They offer a discount for ACA members. It's recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1cHFQVklREAE
